params.name: input
params.description: Path to a 5-column samplesheet TSV (id, fastq_1, fastq_2, long_fastq, fast5).

params.name: assembly_type
params.description: One of short / long / hybrid. Selects which input reads feed assembly.

params.name: kraken2db
params.description: Path to a Kraken2 database tarball.

params.name: baktadb
params.description: Path to a Bakta database directory.

params.name: liftoff_ref_from_kmerfinder
params.description: Source liftoff reference from kmerfinder hit.

params.name: pipelines_testdata_base_path
params.description: Base URL for pipeline test data.

inputs.name: input
inputs.shape: tuple(val(meta), val(reads), path(longreads), path(assembly), path(bam), path(bai), path(fast5))

channels.name: ch_input
channels.source: ch_samplesheet.multiMap(criteria) — splits into named branches: shortreads / longreads / fast5
channels.shape: multimap(shortreads: tuple(meta, fastqs), longreads: tuple(meta, lr), fast5: tuple(meta, fast5))

channels.name: ch_multiqc_files
channels.source: Channel.empty() then accumulated across QC outputs

channels.name: ch_for_assembly
channels.source: conditional on params.assembly_type — built from FASTQ_TRIM_FASTP_FASTQC.out.reads, filtered_long_reads via .cross/.map

channels.name: ch_assembly
channels.source: Channel.empty() then accumulated from UNICYCLER/CANU/MINIASM/RACON/DRAGONFLYE/MEDAKA/NANOPOLISH (one wins by params.assembler+polish)

channels.name: ch_assembly_for_gunzip
channels.source: ch_assembly.branch{ meta, fasta -> gzip: fasta.name.endsWith('.gz'); skip: true }

edges.notes: Channel splits into shortreads/longreads/fast5 named branches via multiMap(criteria) closure.
Only multiple-fastq samples reach CAT_FASTQ_SHORT; single-fastq samples bypass via branch:single.
meta is mutated to single_end:true via map closure before branching.
Mixed with bypass-branch:single; routed when assembly_type != long.
Gated by !skip_pycoqc.
Gated by long_reads_filtering=='porechop'.
Joined with ch_longreads_concat. Gated by long_reads_filtering=='filtlong'. In long mode short side is empty list.
cross by meta.id with filtered_long_reads then map into (meta, sr, lr) triple. Hybrid path.
Gated by assembler=='unicycler'.
Gated by assembler=='canu'. Two map closures pull lr and meta.gsize.
Aliased call. miniasm assembler path: map to (meta, lr) before alignment.
Joined with ch_for_assembly into (meta, lr, paf).
Aliased call; reuses MINIMAP2_ALIGN process.
Triple-joined into (meta, lr, assembly, paf).
Gated by assembler=='dragonflye'.
Gated by polish_method=='medaka'. ch_polish_long shape (meta, lr, fasta).
ch_assembly is reassigned (not mixed) — overrides earlier value.
Aliased call; nanopolish path.
Quad-joined: ch_polish_long + bam + bai + fast5.
Aliased KRAKEN2_KRAKEN2 call. Gated by !skip_kraken2.
Aliased call. Map mutates meta to single_end:true.
Subworkflow call. Gated by !skip_kmerfinder.
Gated by !skip_busco.
Gated by skip_kmerfinder OR (!skip_kmerfinder takes alternate path through QUAST_BYREFSEQID).
Aliased QUAST call. Three map closures split a 5-tuple into three 2-tuples.
Mixed with ch_assembly_for_gunzip.skip; filtered for non-empty fasta. Gated by annotation_tool=='prokka'.
Subworkflow call. Gated by annotation_tool=='bakta'.
Gated by annotation_tool=='dfast'.
Gated by annotation_tool=='liftoff'. log.error fires when reference fasta/gff missing.

inputs.description: Short-read resequencing samplesheet (5-column TSV). URL is a runtime concatenation of params.pipelines_testdata_base_path and 'bacass_short_reseq.tsv'.

outputs.description: nf-test snapshot match against ${params.outdir}: succeeded-task count + versions.yml (Nextflow-version-stripped) + stable file names + stable file contents (excluding tests/.nftignore_files_entirely entirely and tests/.nftignore by content). Snapshot at tests/default.nf.test.snap.
assertions: snapshot(workflow.trace.succeeded().size(), removeNextflowVersion(versions.yml), stable_name, stable_path).match() — lossy summary of the nf-test snapshot fixture (helpers: getAllFilesFromDir, removeNextflowVersion, ignoreFile=tests/.nftignore, ignoreFile-entirely=tests/.nftignore_files_entirely).

warnings: MINIMAP2_ALIGN and BUSCO_BUSCO use mulled-v2 multi-package containers (e.g. mulled-v2-66534bcbb7031a148b13e2ad42583020b9cd25c4:...). The container name is opaque (digest of constituent recipes); tools[].name uses synthetic '<tool>_mulled' to avoid collision, and the bioconda field carries a multi-package spec joined with ' + '. The schema treats this as a single Tool entry; a per-mulled constituent breakdown is not modeled.

Several module environment.yml files contain multiple bioconda dependencies (samtools+htslib, minimap2+samtools+htslib, busco+sepp). Resolved to a synthetic '+'-joined bioconda string; tools[].name picks the canonical tool of the module by convention.

modules/nf-core/racon/environment.yml contains an unrelated bioconda::multiqc=1.27 dependency alongside racon=1.4.20. Likely an upstream module bug; the racon container image only ships racon. Tools[] records racon and ignores the spurious multiqc entry.
Local modules (modules/local/{pycoqc,nanopolish,medaka,dfast,kmerfinder/*,kraken2/db_preparation,custom/multiqc}) lack meta.yml. IO and descriptions inferred from the script: block.

Channel constructions use multiMap (named-branch fan-out: shortreads/longreads/fast5) and .branch{} (single/multiple, gzip/skip). The schema's Channel.source is a single string; named-branch outputs are noted in shape descriptors but not first-class.

.cross() operator (Cartesian-product join by key) and meta-mutation closures (def new_meta = meta + [single_end: true]) appear in the workflow; via[] arrays record operator names but cannot capture the meta-shape transformations.
ch_assembly uses BOTH .mix() accumulation (from assemblers) AND direct reassignment (from MEDAKA/NANOPOLISH polishing) — its 'source' string lists initial+major contributors only.
.dump(tag: 'X') is pervasive (debug operator, no semantic effect on data flow). Recorded in via[] when present; question whether to filter it.
FASTQ_TRIM_FASTP_FASTQC subworkflow takes 7 typed inputs (channels + boolean values + path); Subworkflow.inputs[] uses ChannelIO with shape strings indicating value-vs-channel distinction.

ch_for_assembly, ch_for_kraken2_short, ch_for_kraken2_long are constructed inside if/else if branches on params.assembly_type — channel.source is the *one* expression that ran given assembly_type='short' for the test profile; alternate-branch sources are dropped.

Process count: 33 processes enumerated. script_summary omitted (optional field) — trivially derivable from each module's meta.yml description for nf-core modules and from the script: body for local modules; not material to schema-shape testing on this pipeline.
